## Constitution Compliance (Agent-Specific)

- [ ] CHK-CC-001 Spec exists in `/specs/[feature]/spec.md` and includes Safety & Privacy Assessment
- [ ] CHK-CC-002 Tests written first for P1 work and included in CI (unit, contract, integration)
- [ ] CHK-CC-003 Dry-run evidence attached and reviewed for high-impact changes
- [ ] CHK-CC-004 Audit trail instrumentation defined and validated (PII redaction verified)
- [ ] CHK-CC-005 Security review completed (least-privilege, TLS, input sanitization)
- [ ] CHK-CC-006 Scheduling checks: timezone handling and conflict detection validated (if applicable)

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK001 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK002 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK003 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK004 Another category item
- [ ] CHK005 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK006 Final checklist item in this category

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
